\tzpentry{ID4807}{Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4807 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathcal{H}(\\mathbf{x}, \\mathbf{u}, \\mathbf{p}) = \\mathbf{p}^T \\mathbf{f}(\\mathbf{x}, \\mathbf{u}) \\implies \\frac{\\partial \\mathcal{H}}{\\partial \\mathbf{u}} = 0\n\\end{equation}
